prompt: Tap seat S6 to anchor this track decision.
why_v1: Seat anchors keep your track choice tied to the right player.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Seat S6 is the right player anchor, so the cue read stays tied to the exact seat this plan is built around.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Seat S6 is the live player anchor because consistency disappears as soon as the decision is attached to the wrong stack or range.
